title: Tax Form Annotation Schema
description: Defines the structure for annotating fields and boxes on U.S. tax forms. Enables programmatic rendering and printing of taxpayer values onto form templates with precise positioning.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support

pages.description: Ordered list of pages in the form, each containing field annotations

fieldGroups.description: Logical groupings of fields for UI organization and batch operations

FormMetadata.description: Metadata identifying the form and its annotation version

formId.description: Unique identifier for this annotation definition (e.g., 'irs-1040-2024-v1')

title.description: Human-readable form title (e.g., 'U.S. Individual Income Tax Return')

taxYear.description: Tax year this annotation applies to

version.description: Semantic version of this annotation file (e.g., '1.0.0')

description.description: Optional description of the form's purpose

CoordinateSystem.description: Defines the coordinate system used for all position values in this annotation

origin.description: Location of the coordinate origin on each page

units.description: Unit of measurement for all coordinate values

Page.description: A single page of the form containing field annotations

templateImage.description: Optional path or URL to the form template image/PDF for this page

fields.description: All annotated fields on this page

Dimensions.description: Page dimensions in coordinate units. US Letter = 612×792 points

Field.description: Annotation for a single field/box on the tax form. Defines its position, type, formatting, and how to resolve its value from taxpayer data.

id.description: Unique hierarchical identifier (e.g., 'f1040.page1.line1a'). Must be unique across all pages.

label.description: Human-readable field label for display and debugging

irsLine.description: Official IRS line number or box identifier (e.g., '1a', '7', 'Box 1')

dataRef.description: JSONPath expression to resolve the field value from the taxpayer data object (e.g., '$.taxpayer.primary.firstName', '$.income.wages[0].amount')

readOnly.description: If true, this field is computed or system-generated and should not accept direct input

options.description: For 'enum' type fields: the available options (e.g., filing status radio buttons). Each option may have its own position override.

combDigits.description: For 'comb' type fields: the number of individual character boxes (e.g., 9 for SSN without dashes, 3 for area code)

section.description: Logical section of the form this field belongs to (e.g., 'Income', 'Deductions')

FieldType.description: The semantic type of the field, which determines default formatting and rendering behavior

Position.description: Position and dimensions of the field on the page. Coordinates are relative to the page origin (default: bottom-left). For PDF output: x,y represents the bottom-left corner of the field box.

x.description: Horizontal distance from the left edge of the page

y.description: Vertical distance from the origin (bottom for bottom-left, top for top-left)

Formatting.description: Controls how the field value is rendered within its box. All properties have sensible defaults based on the field type.

fontFamily.description: Font family for text rendering. Courier is IRS-standard for data entry (IRS Pub 1167).

fontSize.description: Font size in points. IRS minimum is 8pt; 10pt is standard.

alignment.description: Horizontal text alignment within the field box

verticalAlignment.description: Vertical text alignment within the field box

backgroundColor.description: Optional background fill color as hex value

letterSpacing.description: Additional spacing between characters in points (useful for comb-style fields)

lineHeight.description: Line height in points for multi-line text fields

checkboxStyle.description: How to render a checked checkbox

Padding.description: Internal padding between the field box edges and the rendered text, in points

NumberFormat.description: Formatting rules for numeric field types (currency, integer, percentage)

decimals.description: Number of decimal places to display (0 = whole dollars on 1040, 2 = dollars+cents on W-2)

negativeStyle.description: How to render negative numbers (IRS typically uses parentheses)

Computation.description: Defines a computed field whose value is derived from other fields. The formula uses field IDs prefixed with $ (e.g., '$f1040.page1.line9 - $f1040.page1.line14').

formula.description: Arithmetic expression using field ID references (prefixed with $)

dependencies.description: List of field IDs this computation depends on, for evaluation ordering

Validation.description: Validation rules to enforce on field values before rendering

required.description: Whether this field must have a non-empty value

minLength.description: Minimum character length for text values

maxLength.description: Maximum character length for text values

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern for value validation

OverflowConfig.description: Controls behavior when the rendered value exceeds the field box dimensions

strategy.description: How to handle overflow. 'truncate': clip text. 'scale': reduce font size. 'wrap': wrap to next line. 'continue': flow into a continuation field.

continuationFieldId.description: When strategy is 'continue', the field ID to overflow into

minFontSize.description: When strategy is 'scale', the smallest allowed font size before falling back to truncation

ConditionalVisibility.description: Makes a field visible/rendered only when a condition is met (e.g., show spouse SSN only when filing status is 'Married Filing Jointly')

dependsOn.description: Field ID or JSONPath dataRef expression to evaluate

value.description: The value to compare against (not needed for isEmpty/isNotEmpty)

EnumOption.description: An option for enum-type fields (e.g., individual radio buttons for filing status). Each option can have its own position on the form.

value.description: The data value that selects this option

position.description: Position of this specific option's checkbox/radio on the form (overrides the parent field position)

FieldGroup.description: A logical grouping of related fields for organizational purposes and batch operations

description.description: Optional description of this field group

fieldIds.description: Ordered list of field IDs belonging to this group
